name: Discovery - Remote Distributed Team
userQuery: we have a remote team across 5 cities and need reliable connectivity
reasoning: Context: Discovery stage - distributed team across multiple locations
Key signals: 'remote team' + '5 cities' + 'reliable connectivity' → need multi-site solution
Solution mapping: Multiple locations = Transport (SD-WAN) + Internet + Security
Target audience: Likely SME or Digital Innovators (remote-first business model)
Bundle opportunity: SD-WAN (connects sites) + Fiber (local connectivity) + Security (protect distributed endpoints)
Scale: 5 cities = small-medium distributed deployment → Basic/Standard tiers

recommendedItems.name: SD-WAN Basic
recommendedItems.reason: Perfect for connecting your 5 city locations into one secure network. Optimizes traffic between sites and ensures reliable connectivity for remote teams. Includes centralized management and monitoring.

recommendedItems.name: Fiber Broadband PEAK 200-400 mbps
recommendedItems.reason: Reliable local internet for each city location. 200-400 Mbps handles video calls, cloud apps, and file sharing for distributed teams. Can be deployed at each site.

recommendedItems.name: On-Premise Defense
recommendedItems.reason: Essential security for distributed teams. Protects all 5 locations from DDoS attacks and cyber threats. Particularly important when employees work remotely across multiple sites.

output.reply:
For your remote team across 5 cities, I recommend a comprehensive distributed connectivity solution:

**SD-WAN Basic**: Connects all 5 locations into one secure network with optimized traffic routing and centralized management
**Fiber Broadband PEAK 200-400 mbps**: Reliable local connectivity at each site for video calls and cloud applications
**On-Premise Defense**: Security protection across all locations to keep your distributed team safe

These work together to create a unified, secure network for your remote workforce. To refine these recommendations, what industry are you in and roughly how many team members at each location?

metadata.notes: Addresses modern remote work scenarios. Shows bundling Transport + Internet + Security for distributed teams. Demonstrates handling multi-location requirements in discovery stage.
